Implement the full CodeFixProvider for category <CATEGORY> in the VisionaryCoder.Tooling suite.

Requirements:
- Namespace: Vc.CodeFixes.<CATEGORY>
- Class: Vc<CATEGORY>CodeFix
- Fix diagnostic ID: VCA<CATEGORY ABBREV>001
- Implement a deterministic code transformation
- Use SyntaxFactory for edits
- Return only the .cs file contents
